decisions.cat1_intent_fidelity: 3 decisions: A-accepted (clarify 'attention management' to 'surface attention management issues'), B-accepted (clarify state file IS the decision record), C-accepted (add self-audit to frontmatter description)
decisions.cat2_workflow_sequencing: 5 decisions: A-accepted (add transition summary between Phase 2 and Phase 3), B-accepted (expand Phase 4 with implementation guidance: priority order, batch related changes, flag conflicts), C-accepted (add mid-category recovery note to Phase 2), D-rejected (don't reorder Phase 3 after Phase 4 — crosscheck before implementation lets us batch skill-creator fixes), E-accepted (add Opportunities section to per-category procedure — MAY, surfaces value-add ideas beyond fixing cons/gaps)
decisions.cat3_input_output_quality: 5 decisions: A-accepted (formalize Phase 2 completion artifact as human-readable decision summary in console output), B-accepted (add done-when gates for Phases 1 and 4), C-accepted (clarify Self-Audit Report and Completion Summary are sequential not alternatives), D-rejected (no formal invocation parameters — AI reads state file automatically), OPP-3A-rejected (no exportable markdown report — JSON state file sufficient)
decisions.cat4_decision_points: 5 decisions: A-accepted (add cross-category revision note for conflicting decisions), B-accepted (add delegation handling — record as delegated-accept), C-accepted (specify sub-batch splitting by theme, severity-first), D-accepted (add implementation approval gate after Phase 2 summary), OPP-4A-accepted (decision confidence tagging: high/medium/low)
decisions.cat5_integration_surface: 6 decisions: A-accepted (state file cleanup guidance — retain as decision record), B-accepted (per-skill state file path), C-accepted (add invocation tracking after Phase 5), D-accepted (skip ROADMAP check), E-rejected (no per-audit REFERENCE.md learning loop), OPP-5A-accepted-modified (ecosystem impact with actionable solutions)
decisions.cat6_guard_rails: 6 decisions: A-accepted (scope explosion guard at midpoint), B-accepted (graceful pause protocol), C-accepted (target skill validation in Phase 1), D-accepted (phase entry gates), E-rejected (no automated contradiction detection), OPP-6A-accepted (audit health self-check)
decisions.cat7_prompt_engineering: 4 decisions: A-accepted (MUST/SHOULD labels on Phases 1 and 4), B-accepted (Phase 5 attention anchor as Critical Rule #6), C-accepted (state persistence at phase boundaries), D-rejected (no MUST/SHOULD in REFERENCE.md)
decisions.cat8_scope_boundaries: 3 decisions: A-accepted (routing section), B-accepted (audit-vs-rewrite threshold at 70%), C-accepted (multi-file skill guidance)
decisions.cat9_institutional_memory: 5 decisions: A-accepted (learning loop with process_feedback), B-accepted (store rejection rationale), C-accepted (check previous audit state files), D-rejected (no CLAUDE.md reference in Cat 7), E-accepted (cross-audit trend tracking)
decisions.cat10_user_experience: 6 decisions: A-accepted (decision count estimate), B-accepted (phase transition markers), C-accepted (anything I missed prompt), D-accepted (mid-audit status at Cat 5), E-accepted (large-audit report guidance), F-accepted (comparison mode for repeat audits)
decisions.crosscheck_skill_creator: 4 updates: SC-1 (interactive design in Step 2), SC-2 (verification phase in Step 4.2), SC-3 (expanded guard rails in Step 2), SC-4 (UX examples in Step 4.2)

cross_cutting_principles: USER-REQ-1: Per-category Opportunities section for value-add recommendations beyond problem-fixing
USER-REQ-2: Ecosystem impact summary must offer actionable solutions, not just notifications
process_feedback: User found the audit useful and expects it to be valuable moving forward.
process_compliance_notes: Opportunities section (Cat2-E) was accepted at Category 2 but not applied until Category 9. Retroactive opportunity pass done after Category 10.
Mid-audit check not presented after Category 5 (process deviation, skill instruction is correct)
Phase transition markers not used until Phase 4 (process deviation, skill instruction is correct)
skill_creator_gap_details: No interactive decision flow design guidance — FIXED (SC-1)
No Opportunities section guidance — not fixed (skill-audit specific)
Guard rails listed as checklist but no implementation guidance — FIXED (SC-3)
UX elements listed but no examples — FIXED (SC-4)
No decision confidence tagging guidance — not fixed (skill-audit specific)
